description: M1 Warehouse — 3-domain layout: citation_files/ (PDF guideline library, 4 tiers), practice_questions/ (Q&A study deliverables), ite_exams/ (raw exam PDF archive). Build/maintain scripts in scripts/.

citation_files.description: PDF guideline library. ITE subtree has 4 enrichment tiers; AAFP subtree holds AAFP citation PDFs.

VC_fail.description: PDFs that have NOT passed the VC gate (session_hy_inserts_v7.json). Destined for local_lite after enrichment.
VC_fail.note: EXA pipeline (336) + PMC OA (41) + Unpaywall recovery (73) + 37 manual still pending

local_lite.description: VC_fail PDFs that are fully enriched (extraction + synthesis + enrichment + DOCX complete).

VC_pass.description: PDFs that HAVE passed the VC gate. Destined for right_click after enrichment.

right_click.description: VC_pass PDFs that are fully enriched. The highest-value tier.

AAFP.description: AAFP citation PDFs (separate from ITE tiers).

citation_files.note_dupes: _dupe_archive contains 14 duplicate PDFs quarantined during recovery
citation_files.naming_convention: Author_Year#@#ART-XXXX@#@.pdf — ART-ID embedded between #@# (start codon) and @#@ (stop codon)
citation_files.vc_gate: key_data_files/session_hy_inserts_v7.json (352 citations) — sole criterion for right_click vs local_lite

practice_questions.description: Q&A study deliverables — 1 DOCX + 1 XLSX per ITE year (2018–2025) and 13 DOCX + 13 XLSX for AAFP quizzes. Gitignored; regenerable from DB at any time.
practice_questions.design_rule: MC answer choices are uniform (dark text, no bold). Only the ✓ Answer: banner reveals the correct answer. Hybrid exam/study-guide use case.

ite_exams.description: Archive of all available ABFM ITE raw exam PDFs. Two files per year: questions and critique.
ite_exams.note: 2026 exam PDFs will land here first when released. Pipeline entry: extract_ite_year.py --year 2026

build.description: Full DB rebuild sequence (9 scripts, self-contained). Run in order for a clean build. Assume DB does NOT exist yet.
scripts: build_clean_question_bank.py — Step 1: Excel → ite_questions_clean.json
rebuild_ite_db_v2.py — Step 2: core DB from JSON (2020–2025)
extract_ite_2018_2019.py — Step 3: [DEPRECATED] extract 2018-2019 from split PDFs
enrich_ite_questions.py — Step 4: Claude API enrichment for 2018-2019
integrate_2018_2019.py — Step 5: [DEPRECATED] merge 2018-2019 into DB
backfill_keywords_2018_2019.py — Step 6: [DEPRECATED] keyword backfill for 2018-2019
validate_db_v2.py — Step 7: post-build QC
compute_embeddings.py — Step 8: vector embeddings (--new-only for incremental)
validate_vector_search.py — Step 9: post-embedding QC

maintain.description: Operational / recurring scripts. Assume DB exists and has data. Run as needed.
scripts: aafp_cleanup_filenames.py — fix ALL-CAPS author names
aafp_fill_gaps.py — download missing AAFP PDFs
aafp_retry_playwright.py — paywalled PDF fallback
aafp_retry_selenium.py — Selenium fallback
aafp_top20_downloader.py — top-20 article downloader
aafp_vc_batch_download.py — batch VC article downloader
audit_engine_type_changes.py — detect engine_type changes across runs
backfill_new_article_metadata.py — fill missing metadata for new article records
build_clinical_pathways.py — Layer 3: clinical_pathways table builder
build_crosswalk_index.py — scans codons → crosswalk_index.json
build_match_staging.py — [DEPRECATED] proposes ART-ID matches for unmatched PDFs
build_topic_trends.py — Layer 4a: trend CSVs
download_aafp_acquisitions.py — AAFP acquisition PDF downloader (OA API + E-Fetch fallback)
download_pmc_actor_batch.py — one-off PMC batch downloader (actor-discovered URLs)
match_tiers_to_library.py — scans warehouse PDFs vs ReferenceTiers CSV → match_summary.csv
preprocess_concept_tags.py — concept_tags via API
rebuild_acquisition_list.py — match_summary → confirmed_present.csv + ranked acquisition XLSX
rename_tier_labels_in_db.py — bulk tier label updates in DB
rename_to_codon.py — [DEPRECATED] executes approved codon renames
exa_pdf_finder.py — EXA advanced search for citation gaps (2026-04-05)
exa_pdf_downloader.py — EXA bulk PDF download + codon rename (2026-04-05)
pmc_oa_downloader.py — PMC OA PDF download + codon rename (2026-04-05)
recover_unpaywall.py — Unpaywall API legal OA lookup + download (2026-04-05)
manage_dupes.py — duplicate PDF detection and _dupe_archive/ quarantine (2026-04-05)
maintain.path_pattern: SCRIPT_DIR = Path(__file__).resolve().parent; PROJECT_ROOT = SCRIPT_DIR.parent.parent; WAREHOUSE = PROJECT_ROOT / '01_module.1_warehouse'; CITATION_ITE = WAREHOUSE / 'citation_files' / 'ITE'

scripts: aafp_brq_scraper.py — v3 + resume/salvage logic; Windows-only (VM proxy blocks outbound HTTPS). OUTPUT_DIR = scripts/_aafp_staging/

database.note: DB lives in 00_database/, not in M1. M1 scripts reach it via PROJECT_ROOT / '00_database' / 'db' / 'ite_intelligence.db'

build_aafp_qa_deliverables.py (M3): answer choice formatting fix applied, 26 files regenerated
